# services.osrm

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.osrm`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.osrm.address` | `string` | IP address on which the web server will listen. |
| `services.osrm.algorithm` | `one of "CH", "CoreCH", "MLD"` | Algorithm to use for the data. Must be one of CH, CoreCH, MLD |
| `services.osrm.dataFile` | `absolute path` | Data file location |
| `services.osrm.enable` | `boolean` | Enable the OSRM service. |
| `services.osrm.extraFlags` | `list of string` | Extra command line arguments passed to osrm-routed |
| `services.osrm.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port on which the web server will run. |
| `services.osrm.threads` | `signed integer` | Number of threads to use. |
